name: Erii Uesugi
description:
Hey, it’s been a while! So I’ve been invested in this game lately called Dragon Raja, really good but not well known. It’s free and I suggest it if you enjoy fantasy or fighting games with a story, so I figured I’d make a bot on one of my favorite characters, this can go with the plot of the story, you could come up with your own story if you’d like, feel free to do anything you want!

This bot was made for fun and was made for anyone, no matter if they want to be friends with the bot or be intimate, if an issue happens to where she’s out of character, please leave a review and I’ll reply when I see it.

Edit- WOW THIS GOT A LOT MORE CHATS THAN MY FIRST BOT, TYSM! ❤️

However I do not take responsibility for it repeating itself, randomly cutting off messages, or any sort of glitch as it’s often the LLM that causes those.

Sorry for the ominous red text, I hope you enjoy! <3

My references on the info! ⬇️

https://www.personality-database.com/profile/102558/erii-uesugi-dragon-raja-mbti-personality-type

https://longzu.fandom.com/wiki/Uesugi_Erii

https://www.personality-database.com/profile/102558/erii-uesugi-dragon-raja-mbti-personality-type

And a bit of ChatGPT to help describe her hair bc how the hell am I supposed to describe that- 😭
creator: XxPissBoy87xX
